column1: # Jones & Paulhus (2013) Introducing the Short Dark Triad (SD3): A Brief Measure of Dark Personality Traits. Assessment
# Instructions: Please indicate how much you agree with each of the following statements
# Note: The subscale headings should be removed before the SD3 is administered. Items should be kept in the same order.
